interface: Resource Graph REST API, Resources operation, api-version 2024-04-01

body.subscriptions: array of subscription ids to scope the query

options.$top: 1..1000, rows per page; omit to accept the service default
options.$skip: rows to skip; overridden by $skipToken when both present
options.$skipToken: opaque continuation token from the previous response; the follow-up request must repeat the SAME query and scopes
options.resultFormat: objectArray (rows as JSON objects) or table; this client always pins objectArray

response.data: objectArray format: array of row objects
response.resultTruncated: STRING enum "true"/"false" (not a JSON boolean); "true" means results were cut off and no $skipToken accompanies it
response.$skipToken: present when another page exists; absent on the final page
response.paging_rules: no $skipToken is emitted when the query uses limit/sample/take or all output columns are dynamic/null typed; count < totalRecords also signals truncation

quota_headers.x-ms-user-quota-remaining: int; queries left in the current window (e.g. 15 per 5-second window)
quota_headers.x-ms-user-quota-resets-after: hh:mm:ss duration until the quota window resets

throttling.client_rule: when x-ms-user-quota-remaining reaches 0, wait x-ms-user-quota-resets-after before the next query
throttling.throttled_response: 429 with error.code RateLimiting (ARG-level); honor Retry-After (seconds) when present and retry the identical request a bounded number of times

continuation_safety: a service or proxy bug that replays the same $skipToken would loop a naive client forever; receiving the token just sent must be detected and reported as an error while preserving rows already fetched
